1.label: Input IN1
1.description: Devices in this group will receive Basic Set or alarm frames when the IN1 input is triggered.

2.label: Input IN2
2.description: Devices in this group will receive Basic Set or alarm frames when the IN2 input is triggered.

paramInformation.label: IN1: Alarm Cancellation Delay
paramInformation.description: Additional time after which the IN1 alarm is cancelled once its violation has ceased

paramInformation.label: IN2: Alarm Cancellation Delay
paramInformation.description: Additional time after which the IN2 alarm is cancelled once its violation has ceased

paramInformation.label: Type of Control Frame for Association Group 1
Type of Control Frame for Association Group 2
Forced Level of Dimming Group 1
paramInformation.description: Forced level of dimming / opening sun blinds when a "switch on" / "open" command is sent to devices from association group 1. In the case of alarm frames the alarm priority is specified.

options.label: Turn on (Dimmers use previous stored level)

paramInformation.label: Forced Level of Dimming Group 2
paramInformation.description: Forced level of dimming / opening sun blinds when a "switch on" / "open" command is sent to devices from association group 2. In the case of alarm frames the alarm priority is specified.

options.label: Turn on (Dimmers use previous stored level)

paramInformation.label: Deactivate Transmission of Frame Canceling Alarm
paramInformation.description: Alarm violation and activation commands are always sent

paramInformation.label: Deactivate Transmission of Frame Canceling Alarm
paramInformation.description: Alarm violation and activation commands are always sent

paramInformation.label: Interval Between Readings of Temperature Sensors
Temperature Report Interval
paramInformation.description: The forced report is sent immediately after the next temperature reading, irrespective of parameter 12

paramInformation.label: Temperature Change Report Threshold
paramInformation.description: Maximum difference between the last reported temperature and the current temperature. Value = delta T (°C) * 16, e.g. 8 = 0.5 °C.

paramInformation.label: Transmitting Alarm/Control Frame in Broadcast Mode
paramInformation.description: Information sent in broadcast mode is not repeated by the mesh network. Broadcast transmission disables singlecast transmission to the corresponding association group.

options.label: IN1 and IN2 broadcast mode inactive
IN1 broadcast mode active, IN2 broadcast mode inactive
IN1 broadcast mode inactive, IN2 broadcast mode active
IN1 and IN2 broadcast mode active

metadata.inclusion: Quickly press the B-button three times. The button is located in the center of the device.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly press the B-button three times. The button is located in the center of the device.
metadata.reset:
1. Cut off the power supply.
2. Re-connect the power supply while holding down the B-button.
3. Hold the B-button for 10 seconds.
4. Cut off and re-connect the power supply once more.
